text: Good evening. My name is Lena. I'm just checking something from our records from your local county in the state of Indiana. It will just take a few seconds. So are you currently enrolled in Medicare Part A and B? Well, I was asking if you both Part A and B of Medicare. Can you hear me? I was asking if you have Part A and B of Medicare.
